verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In your bed you begged for forgiveness Cried a river full of tears You still feel grief and sorrow Inside you're filled with fear The temptation's quiet whisper In it's subtle secret way Will find you at your weakest And again cause you to stray

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let it go, give it to Jesus Let it go, the guilt you feel inside There's no need for you to be defeated When there's nothing left for you to hide For His Blood destroyed the traces That sin had left behind Walk on in His forgiveness Mercy granted one more time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You don't have to feel so useless Forget what's in the past Hold to your salvation You can count on it to last Let God's Spirit lead you To perfect peace and more The joy that you are missing He'll soon restore. .
